operator_summary: Proved autonomy improvement `lean-remote-build-pack-staging-v1` from `algosec-diagnostic-framework-build-pack-v1`. Adopted surfaces: materializer_defaults. Pending surfaces: source_template_tracking.
summary: Reduced remote build-pack staging to PackFactory-essential ADF inputs by excluding the heavy algosec-lab baseline candidate snapshot and by fixing dot-prefixed exclusion matching for .pack-state and .packfactory-remote paths.

notes: This is the main automatic inheritance path for future build-packs.
When an autonomy improvement lands here, newly materialized build-packs receive it by default.
This records whether the source template itself has been updated to describe or carry the improvement.
Pending here means the improvement may still be inherited through factory tooling without being reflected directly in the template source.
